card_description: Thomas Mann is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick explores the "Lived Myth" (Joseph Campbell) and "Ma'at" (Right Order) as keys to his 1974 experience."

linked_segments.summary: Dick explores the "Lived Myth" (Joseph Campbell) and "Ma'at" (Right Order) as keys to his 1974 experience. He identifies the "Xerox Letter" as a ritual repudiation of materialism and a transformation
linked_segments.title: U_Claudia_28.txt
